GetContainerization.description: Grants permission to get the details of all Containerization jobs

GetDeployment.description: Grants permission to get the details of all Deployment jobs

GetGroupingAssessment.description: Grants permission to Get the details of a Grouping Assessment Operation

GetPortingCompatibilityAssessment.description: Grants permission to Get Porting Compatibility Operation

GetPortingRecommendationAssessment.description: Grants permission to Get the details of a Porting Recommendation Assessment Operation

GetRuntimeAssessment.description: Grants permission to Get the details of a Runtime Assessment Operation

PutLogData.description: Grants permission to Push Logs (Intended for Clients Only)

PutMetricData.description: Grants permission to Push Metrics Data (Intended for Clients Only)

StartContainerization.description: Grants permission to start a Containerization job

StartDeployment.description: Grants permission to start a Deployment job

StartGroupingAssessment.description: Grants permission to Start a Grouping Assessment Operation

StartPortingCompatibilityAssessment.description: Grants permission to Start Porting Compatibility Operation

StartPortingRecommendationAssessment.description: Grants permission to Start the Porting Recommendation Assessment Operation

StartRuntimeAssessment.description: Grants permission to Start a Runtime Assessment Operation
